notes: WP-04 = Modals (askTextModal / openBugReportModal / openParkModal / _openMarkPrecedentModal). The bug-report modal is ENTIRELY class-driven (.gam-bug-report-* + .gam-modal* + .gam-btn*) and those CSS rules were already migrated to var(--gam-tok-*) / aliased C.* by WP-01/WP-02 — so no bug-modal edits are needed here (its inline DOM carries no hex). WP-04's actual surface = the INLINE-styled DOM of the other three modals (askText, park, precedent), which still carry raw hex. All inline edits are string-concatenation onto GAM_TOK.* (never var() inside cssText). One new <style> rule (.gam-input-group) is appended via var(--gam-tok-*) since it lives inside GAM_CSS where var() is safe. Brief line numbers had drifted post WP-01/02; all oldStrings re-verified to occur exactly once against the live file.

edits.oldString:
background:'rgba(0,0,0,0.55)', zIndex:'9999994',
            display:'flex', alignItems:'center', justifyContent:'center' }
edits.newString:
background:GAM_TOK.scrim, zIndex:'9999994',
            display:'flex', alignItems:'center', justifyContent:'center' }
edits.note: askText backdrop -> shared scrim token (0.60). Drops the bespoke 0.55. z stays in WP-02's asktext tier (9999994, one below .gam-modal).

edits.oldString:
cls: 'gam-modal gam-v72-asktext',
          style: { background:'#1a1c20', color:'#e4e4e4', borderRadius:'8px',
            padding:'16px 18px', minWidth:'320px', maxWidth:'520px',

edits.newString:
cls: 'gam-modal gam-v72-asktext',
          style: { background:GAM_TOK.surfaceRaised, color:GAM_TOK.ink, borderRadius:'8px',
            padding:'16px 18px', minWidth:'320px', maxWidth:'520px',
            border:'1px solid '+GAM_TOK.borderStrong,
            boxShadow:'0 8px 24px '+GAM_TOK.scrim,
            fontFamily:'ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif' },
edits.note: askText panel: surface-raised body + border-strong + single scrim shadow (per WP-04.1). #1a1c20->surfaceRaised, #e4e4e4->ink. Adds the 1px border-strong the elevation contract requires.
askText title -> card-title scale (15px/600, ink). Drops the #4A9EFF blue heading (titles are ink, not info-blue; info is reserved for links/input accents per token roles).
askText field label -> 11px caps ink-muted rhythm (matches .gam-input-group label). #aaa->inkMuted.

edits.oldString:

edits.note: askText validation error -> danger token. #E74C3C->danger.
askText Cancel -> ghost button (transparent + 1px border + ink-muted), 6px radius, 32px min target. Matches the cancel/secondary treatment; #2a2a2a/#e4e4e4 retired.
askText OK -> primary accent fill with on-accent-dark text (WCAG 1.4.3: black-on-amber 9.86). #4A9EFF/#fff retired; 6px radius, 32px min target, 600 weight.

edits.oldString: style: { position: 'fixed', top: 0, left: 0, right: 0, bottom: 0, background: 'rgba(0,0,0,0.65)', zIndex: 10000000, display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', justifyContent: 'center' }
edits.newString: style: 'position:fixed;top:0;left:0;right:0;bottom:0;background:'+GAM_TOK.scrim+';z-index:var(--z-modal,9999995);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;'
edits.note: Park overlay -> shared scrim (drops bespoke 0.65) + z drops from rogue 10000000 to the --z-modal tier (WP-04.4/.5). Switched to a cssText string so var(--z-modal) resolves — the z-ladder prop is defined in GAM_CSS:root and var() is valid for z-index in a cssText string set via el()'s style:'...' path (no color var() involved).

edits.oldString: .gam-textarea{resize:vertical;min-height:72px;font-family:inherit}
edits.note: New .gam-input-group rule appended after .gam-textarea (WP-04.2): one form-field rhythm for modals. Lives inside GAM_CSS where var(--gam-tok-*) is safe. Additive — does not alter the existing .gam-field/.gam-input rules WP-01/02 already migrated. Anchored on the unique .gam-textarea line so it applies cleanly in order.

summary: WP-04 migrates the inline-styled DOM of the askText, Park, and Precedent modals (the Bug modal is already class-driven via WP-01/02-migrated .gam-bug-report-*/.gam-modal*/.gam-btn* rules, so it needs no edits). 23 edits: 22 inline-hex migrations to GAM_TOK string-concatenation (surface-raised bodies + border-strong + scrim shadows + surface-sunken field wells + accent primary buttons with on-accent-dark text + ghost cancel buttons + ink/ink-muted/danger text), plus 1 new .gam-input-group <style> rule (var(--gam-tok-*)) giving modals one shared form-field rhythm. Park z (rogue 10000000) and Precedent z (rogue 2147483650) both collapse onto the --z-modal ladder tier; all three backdrops adopt the single scrim 0.60 token. No locked selector renamed; no accessible-name textContent changed. Component literal hex -> zero in all four modal functions' inline styles.
